note: Day 34 (Thursday). Warm pipeline buffer expires TOMORROW (2026-05-02, Saturday). Pre-generated notes for leads 1/3/22 are valid and ready. Preferred dispatch: Monday 2026-05-04. IMAP sweep mandatory before sending any note — 27-day gap means a silent reply is a genuine risk. Leads 1/3/22 declared PRESUMED_LOST_NO_RESPONSE in daily_signals.json. LinkedIn is the last available soft channel before archiving. No new profile data received from HANDS (linkedin_profiles_json_received = 0 across all 34 campaign days). Post_reference upgrades remain possible — HANDS must check each profile on Monday before deciding note type.

strategy.tone: slightly awkward genuine compliment — stands out from polished AI outreach slop
anti_patterns: Do not use 'I came across your profile'
Do not use 'I was impressed by'
Do not mention AI or automation
Do not pitch in the note — curiosity only
Do not use 'reach out' or 'touch base'
Do not mention 'digital marketing' or 'web design' explicitly
Do not reference the email outreach in warm pipeline nurture notes
Do not reference any previous contact in warm pipeline nurture notes — treat as first contact
strategy.priority_upgrade_rule: HANDS: always check LinkedIn profile for posts from last 60 days BEFORE sending any note. If post found: use post_reference note (3-4x higher acceptance rate). If no recent posts: use generic note. MANDATORY for warm pipeline leads.
strategy.warm_pipeline_note_rule: Warm pipeline notes (leads 1/3/22) must NOT reference the email sequence, the campaign, or any prior contact. Treat as a cold LinkedIn connection from someone who noticed their business online.
strategy.presumed_lost_framing: These leads are PRESUMED_LOST_NO_RESPONSE. The LinkedIn note is a soft, no-pressure connection — not a follow-up. The note does not reference any email exchange. If they connect and message, respond naturally. Do not immediately pitch.

no_active_notes_reason: Warm pipeline leads 1/3/22 still have 1 day remaining in the 7-day post-close buffer (expires 2026-05-02 — TOMORROW). Notes become eligible tomorrow; preferred dispatch Monday 2026-05-04. No Batch 5 leads. All Batch 1-4 sequences complete.

batch_5_note_templates.status: READY — templates prepared. Note generation begins on Day 3 after Batch 5 initial emails fire. If sends fire Friday 2026-05-02: Day 3 = Monday 2026-05-04 directly.
batch_5_note_templates.post_reference_template: [Name] — saw your post about [X]. [Business] caught my eye looking at [trade] businesses in [town]. Noticed something about the site worth mentioning. Connecting in case it's useful.
batch_5_note_templates.generic_template: [Name] — [Business] came up when I was looking at [trade] businesses in [town]. Something about the [website/online presence] caught my attention. Connecting in case it's relevant.
batch_5_note_templates.headline_template: [Name] — [headline reference] caught my attention. [Business] came up looking at [trade] businesses in [town]. Noticed something about the online presence. Connecting in case it's useful.
batch_5_note_templates.char_limit_reminder: All notes must be trimmed to 200 chars or fewer. Count every character — LinkedIn free account limit is absolute.

upgrade_decision_matrix.post_from_last_60_days_found: USE post_reference — highest acceptance rate (3-4x over generic)
upgrade_decision_matrix.distinctive_headline_found: USE headline — e.g. 'Malton's only RICS-registered surveyor' → reference the credential specifically
upgrade_decision_matrix.inactive_profile_or_no_profile: SKIP — log in linkedin_profiles.json as 'not_found' or 'inactive'. Do not send generic to a profile with zero activity.

campaign_linkedin_assessment.root_cause: HANDS execution latency. LinkedIn window (Day 3-6) is narrow and cannot be recovered once missed. Notes were generated correctly by BRAIN on 7 consecutive runs. Zero notes confirmed sent by HANDS across 34 campaign days.
campaign_linkedin_assessment.key_learning: The 'post_reference upgrade' step requires HANDS to check each profile BEFORE sending — this step was not executed once across 34 campaign days. For warm pipeline and Batch 5: HANDS must open LinkedIn, search, check for posts, and send in a SINGLE SESSION.
campaign_linkedin_assessment.monday_protocol_change: BRAIN flags Monday 2026-05-04 as a MANDATORY combined LinkedIn session in daily_signals.json. Warm pipeline nurture + Batch 5 Day 3 (if sends fire Friday). HANDS must write linkedin_profiles.json after every search session — even if no note was sent. This has not happened once in 34 days.
